copy.bulletinIntro: Guild news, event notes, raffles, and small calls that keep the hall moving.
copy.doorsIntro: Step through the join path, ranks, leaders, and Codex that keep Mōchirīī warm and steady.
copy.spotlightIntro: A warm shoutout for a member whose care helps the hall feel alive.
copy.galleryIntro: Screenshots from shared runs, quiet wandering, and the little moments that become guild memory.

descriptor: Mōchirīī is a cozy Where Winds Meet guild for players who like friendly company, relaxed events, helpful runs, and a soft place to rest between adventures.
Step in through Discord, read the joining path, and grow with us at your own pace. Check event notes, RSVP when planning helps, and bring a little warmth to the hall.

seal.title: Guild Seal
verse: Silvered jade softly gleams, where quiet petals fall,
Bamboo stands in patient grace, a guardian to all.
Hearts gather here in gentle light, unhurried, warm & true,
A seal of trust, of shared resolve, where kindred spirits grew.

bulletins.title: Monthly guild meeting for current members to gather, plan, and be heard.
Monthly cosmetics raffle for active members who keep the hall alive.
Leadership roles are open for members ready to guide with care.
